name: complex::sequential_early_returns::ref::direct
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (!ready.value) return; if (!enabled.value) return; payload.value; });
